examples: When you sign up, you adopt an animated penguin to chat with friends, play games, explore, collect coins and even personalize your very own igloo.
Sometimes he stays in an ice house called igloo.
In Nunavut's "igloo and email" society, where adults who were born in igloos have children who may never have been out on the land, there's a high incidence of depression.
One such igloo complex tunnels under the grounds of a ski resort in Krvavec, Slovenia.
The igloo was built by 31-year-old Craig Parker, who has fought cancer three times, and four friends.
